summary: Iteration 2 testing: Auth (JWT), Admin dashboard (inquiries CRUD + blog CRUD), public blog, package detail, SEO meta. 22/23 backend tests passed (1 skipped for non-existent seeded slug). 100% of admin + public frontend flows passed after a frontend restart that was required to pick up the updated /app/frontend/public/index.html SEO tags.

minor.issue: Agent-to-agent context note claims a post with slug 'umrah-landing' was seeded, but the actual seeded slug is 'tips-persiapan-umroh-pertama-kali-untuk-jamaah-indonesia'. Note vs. reality mismatch — no functional bug, just documentation inaccuracy.

integration_issues.issue: Initially, public/index.html SEO additions (description, og:*, twitter:*, favicon SVG, theme-color) were NOT served by the CRA dev server because the html-webpack-plugin only re-reads the template on full webpack restart (not on hot-reload). After `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`, all tags rendered correctly. Main agent should be aware: any future index.html change requires a frontend restart. This is a CRA dev-server limitation, not a code bug.

action_items: (Optional) Update agent context: seeded blog slug is 'tips-persiapan-umroh-pertama-kali-untuk-jamaah-indonesia', not 'umrah-landing'.
Whenever modifying /app/frontend/public/index.html in the future, run `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` to ensure changes are served.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminBlogEditor uses a free-form Textarea for content; markdown preview is rendered on BlogDetail via react-markdown — works fine. Consider adding optimistic UI for save success toast.
AdminInquiries uses shadcn AlertDialog for delete confirmation — correctly wired. No issues.

PackageDetail back-link uses `to='/#packages'` (HashLink-style on plain Link); navigates with hash but does NOT scroll to #packages on existing single page (react-router v6 doesn't auto-scroll to fragment). Consider using react-router-hash-link or an effect to scrollIntoView. Minor UX nit.
Auth: JWT stored in localStorage as 'baba_token'. For production, prefer httpOnly cookie (XSS resilience). Acceptable for MVP.
Server seed_admin: please verify it is idempotent and updates the password on each startup so env-var rotations propagate (playbook requirement). Not retested here but login worked.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login — playbook requires lockout after 5 failed attempts. Not implemented yet.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (12/12 admin flow steps + all package/blog/SEO flows)

test_credentials: admin@babatour.com / BabaTour2026! — read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and verified working.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed inquiries and one blog post 'TEST_E2E Blog UI'. All cleaned up via DELETE endpoints. Final DB state: 1 seeded inquiry (existing) preserved, 1 seeded blog post 'tips-persiapan-umroh-pertama-kali-untuk-jamaah-indonesia' preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_admin_blog.py — reuse as regression. The frontend restart is required after any public/index.html change because CRA's html-webpack-plugin caches the template. Brute-force lockout + httpOnly cookie auth are NOT yet implemented (per playbook). Seeded blog slug is 'tips-persiapan-umroh-pertama-kali-untuk-jamaah-indonesia'.

playbook_compliance.bcrypt_hash_format: Not directly inspected, but login works — assumed correct (PyJWT + bcrypt per agent note).
playbook_compliance.httpOnly_cookies: NOT IMPLEMENTED — uses localStorage token (baba_token). Playbook requires httpOnly cookies.
playbook_compliance.brute_force_lockout: NOT IMPLEMENTED — no lockout after failed attempts.
playbook_compliance.seed_admin_idempotent: Login works after restart, but did not verify password-rotation path.

rca_of_the_issue: SEO tags not initially rendered → CRA's html-webpack-plugin only re-reads public/index.html on full webpack restart, not on file watcher events. Fix: sudo supervisorctl restart frontend after editing public/index.html. Verified working after restart.
